# Extra allowlist for the Presidio PHI scan (.github/scripts/scan_phi.py).
# Two kinds of entries, one per line:
#
#   path: <glob>     - skip an entire file (matched against the repo-relative
#                       path with forward slashes, e.g. path: src/data/demo/**)
#   regex: <pattern>  - skip any finding whose matched line matches this regex
#                       (e.g. known placeholder names used in fixtures)
#
# Lines starting with # are comments. You can also silence a single line
# inline by adding `# presidio:ignore` at the end of it.
#
# Examples:
# path: src/data/synthetic/**
# regex: Jane\s+Doe
